title: Manage landscape projects
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage landscape projects demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify issues relating to  landscape project

pcs.text: Discuss and clarify client goals and project objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and clarify client goals and project objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and clarify client goals and project objectives.

pcs.text: Analyse landscape documentation to determine nature and scope of project

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential constraints to success of the project.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures.
